ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Continued To May-01-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Rowe appeared by telephone for Helen Wong (Administrator).

The Court noted that this is on calendar for lack of response to issues raised by the Probate Examiner back in December. Ms. Rowe stated that she is waiting for Ms. Wong to send statements, that her Client is hard to reach, that her Client does not do e-mail and that she will push her Client to get things done. Ms. Rowe also stated that she will ask Ms. Wong to make the payment to the Probate Referee and that it is very difficult to communicate with her. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on May 1, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Amended First and Final Accounting, etc. is also is continued to that date. If the required documents are not filed three days prior to the hearing date, both the Attorney and the Administrator are to appear.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2018 Continued To May-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Rowe for Helen Wong (Administrator) via Court Call

Ms. Rowe stated that she filed a late Inventory and Appraisal last week after discovering it was incorrect, had to re-do it, and had submitted a First and Final Report and Accounting petition for e-filing. The Court advised Counsel, there is no Inventory and Appraisal on file and the pending e-filed petition submitted on March 29, 2018 will most likely be rejected due to improper filing. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court sanctions Ms. Rowe $20.00 per day effective today, April 2, 2018, until the Inventory and Appraisal is filed. Sanctions will be suspended if the Inventory and Appraisal is filed by May 2, 2018.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2018 Continued To Apr-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Howe for Helen Wong (Administrator).

Ms. Rowe stated that she e-filed an inventory and appraisal, that it got rejected, that she was not aware that a Probate Referee had been appointed, and that she will contact the Referee immediately and get it submitted. Status on close of estate is continued to April 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-27-2017 Continued To Jan-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Rowe, for and with petitioner Helen Wong.

Ms. Rowe apologized for the delay in filing the inventory and appraisal, and for the failure to appear at the previously scheduled hearing on December 4, 2017. She stated that there were several stocks and securities that required appraisal. The Court replied that she needed to get the inventory and appraisal on file. The matter was continued to January 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Order to Appear was ordered off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-27-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Dec-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Administrator to appear on December 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
